activities.name: Grand Ridge Lollipop with Monica
activities.description: Very fun to run together for the first time. There  will be more!

activities.name: Crown of Magnolia with Priya, Anita, Mintu, Tamara, and Mattias!
activities.description: Glorious cool sunny morning, and great views out to the sound

activities.name: Breathing only through the nose
activities.description: Herve swears by it. As expected I found the first attempt very tough, and am still feeling a little O2 deprived 30 mins later!

activities.name: Graduate level Jordan curve in the arboretum
Fresh snow on Rattlesnake Ridge
activities.description: Mark and I and hopefully Herve are doing the Rattlesnake trail 1/2 marathon on the 16th. We went up for a look at the trail and brought Steve along too. Glorious weather and great fun.

activities.name: Recovery shuffle to start… better later
Short run or enormous SIM card?
Another great Bridle Trails run with the gang
activities.description: Anita, Mintu, Priya, Mattias, Herve, Ana, and Lauren today.

activities.name: Maximal Jordan curve in Tangletown?
activities.description: Took nearly as long to plan it as run it.

activities.name: Little one with an uphill push
Trail work for the WTA
activities.description: Filling low spots with gravel and building rock retainers. Quite fun after the snow stopped falling!

activities.name: Easy on the knee
activities.description: I’m off running for a little while… right knee started feeling weird last week, so trying to not make things worse. Herkimer coffee makes everything better

activities.name: Half saunter half shuffle in the sunshine
Surveying the Middle Fork Trail and the Dingford Creek road
activities.description:
This part of the MFT was mostly rocky and muddy right now, so not as runnable (for me) as I had been hoping. The Road to Dingford Creek has some very big puddles of unknown depth. Unclear whether a low-medium clearance car could make it in the summer.
Very glad to get way into the Cascades on Earth Day though!

activities.name: Springtime in St Edwards
activities.description: Trees, canyons, ridges and Lake Washington. What more do you need?

activities.name: 4 weeks to David’s Backyard Ultra!
activities.description:
18 people are signed up for my informal endurance event on this course on May 28th. Are you? 

Don’t be put off by the word “ultra” — one or two laps is great — come join the fun, and score a one of a kind Welsh slate medal!

activities.name: Madison Park and the Arboretum with Lauren, Anita, and Mintu
